author: MiaoMiao
description: Illustrious EPS model optimizing texture, semantic understanding, and skin rendering. Integrates anime aesthetics with realistic skin textures while maintaining stable limb proportions. One-prompt simplicity.
trigger: masterpiece, best quality, absurdres, newest, very aesthetic, amazing quality, highres, sensitive, complex background, ultra detailed, best anatomy, HDR, 8K, high detail RAW color art, high contrast, depth of field
negative: lowres, (bad), limb asymmetry, bad feet, text, error, fewer, extra, missing, worst quality, jpeg artifacts, low quality, watermark, unfinished, displeasing, oldest, early, chromatic aberration, signature, simple_background, artistic error, username, scan, [abstract], english text, shiny_skin
notes: No complex prompting needed. Danbooru tags with spaces. Author uses CFG 6 in all examples. Hires fix recommended: 4x-UltraSharp 2x upscale, 10 steps, 0.3 denoise.
